name: Speed-to-Lead
description: Qualify inbound intake-form submissions via SMS within minutes and book the next available consultation.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{contact.firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks so much for reaching out about a new-patient consultation! No pressure at all, just a couple quick questions so we can get you set up: what day/time works best for you, and do you have dental insurance you'd like us to check?
steps.exit_when: The prospect has shared a preferred appointment day/time for their new-patient consultation AND confirmed their dental insurance status (yes / no / unsure).

extract.preferred_start: ISO-8601 datetime for the preferred appointment start, snapped to the next available slot in the clinic's business hours (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm local time).
extract.insurance_status: one of: yes | no | unsure | not_asked

args.notes: Booked by Speed-to-Lead agent. Insurance status: {{insurance_status}}.

args.subject: You're booked with Bright Smile Dental 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{contact.firstName}},

You're all set for {{preferred_start}} — we're really looking forward to meeting you.

Here's what to expect: a relaxed 45-minute new-patient visit with zero sales pressure. We'll get to know you, take a gentle look, and answer every question you've got. Our job is to make dental care feel easier, not scarier.

Need to move things around? Just reply to this email or text us back — we'll sort it out, no problem.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile Dental team
